# programs.yazi

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.yazi`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.yazi.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable yazi terminal file manager. |
| `programs.yazi.flavors` | `attribute set of (absolute path or package)` | Pre-made themes. See <https://yazi-rs.github.io/docs/flavors/overview/> for documentation. |
| `programs.yazi.initLua` | `null or absolute path` | The init.lua for Yazi itself. |
| `programs.yazi.package` | `package` | The yazi package to use. |
| `programs.yazi.plugins` | `attribute set of (absolute path or package)` | Lua plugins. See <https://yazi-rs.github.io/docs/plugins/overview/> for documentation. |
| `programs.yazi.settings` | `submodule` | Configuration included in `$YAZI_CONFIG_HOME`. |
| `programs.yazi.settings.keymap` | `TOML value` | Configuration included in `keymap.toml`. See <https://yazi-rs.github.io/docs/configuration/keymap/> for documentation. |
| `programs.yazi.settings.theme` | `TOML value` | Configuration included in `theme.toml`. See <https://yazi-rs.github.io/docs/configuration/theme/> for documentation. |
| `programs.yazi.settings.vfs` | `TOML value` | Configuration included in `vfs.toml`. See <https://yazi-rs.github.io/docs/configuration/vfs/> for documentation. |
| `programs.yazi.settings.yazi` | `TOML value` | Configuration included in `yazi.toml`. See <https://yazi-rs.github.io/docs/configuration/yazi/> for documentation. |
